name: Honey Mustard Steaks & Grilled Onions
recipeIngredient: 4 thick well-trimmed boneless beef top loin or ribeye steaks
1 large red onion, cut into 1/2-inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine glaze ingredients in a bowl.
2. Place beef steaks and onions on the grill over medium, ash-covered coals.
3. Brush both sides of the steaks and onions with the glaze.
4. Grill top loin steaks, uncovered, for 15 to 18 minutes (ribeye steaks for 11 to 14 minutes) until the steaks are medium rare to medium and the onion is tender. Turn occasionally and brush with glaze as needed.
5. Once cooked, remove from the grill and serve.
YIELD: 4 servings
